summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Greenline Activations ROI Calculator. All features working correctly including interactive sliders, dynamic calculations, responsive design, and brand styling.
passed_tests: Page title correctly shows 'Greenline Activations ROI Calculator' without 'Plift x'
All 5 sliders functional (activations, sampled, conversion, price, units per buyer)
Metric cards display and update dynamically when sliders change
Sprint economics breakdown calculates and displays correctly
ROI grid shows Sprint ROI %, Cost per Buyer, Break-even Units accurately
20 activation ramp bars display with proper profit indicators
Comparison table shows Greenline vs alternatives with proper styling
Coral callout section displays with correct background color
Footer displays correctly with proper branding
Responsive design works on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Dynamic calculations update in real-time when slider values change
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
